title: Compare develop vs main after branch migration
description: Audit branch delta between develop and main, confirm whether recent PITR/HITL/code-quality fixes are included in main, and summarize remaining merge items.

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Branch audit complete. origin/main...origin/develop = 0 left / 4 right commits. File-level diff is only dashboard/lib/procedure-hitl.ts. Non-merge delta contains commit d6582764 (HITL metadata guard fix), which is present in develop/dev but not in main. PITR commit f328f10c is already contained in origin/main.
